name: Stride, Inc.
description: Stride, Inc. is a technology-based education company that provides online learning solutions for students from kindergarten through 12th grade, as well as career learning programs for all ages. Headquartered in Reston, Virginia, the company offers a range of services including curriculum, software systems, and educational services designed to provide flexible, personalized learning experiences. By leveraging technology to deliver high-quality instruction, Stride aims to empower learners to achieve their full potential and prepare for future success in an evolving global economy. The company serves millions of learners across the United States through its innovative educational platforms.
